title: How to view the latest issues of a board, ignoring their group

posts.author: robopzet (Rob Schlüter)
posts.cookedHtml:
For a quick view of new issues I am trying to create a list of all issues from all groups on a board, ordered by their creation date.

First, I don’t see a creation date column.

Second, when sorting items on a board I don’t see the option to ignore groups. The best option would be to show the group as a single column.

Even better would be if I could create a view in a personal space with data from multiple boards, with sort and filter options.
